ROOFS BLOWN OFF IN SHARPSBURG AT 167 MAIN STREET AND 120 BACK STREET.

EMERGENCY MANAGER REPORTS STRAIGHT-LINE WIND DAMAGE ON POPLAR GROVE ROAD. DAMAGE INCLUDED A COLLAPSED GARAGE, TREES DOWN WITH ONE ACROSS TWO VEHICLES AND ONE ON A HOUSE, BARN AND SILO DESTROYED AND AN OUTBUILDING MOVED.

*** 1 INJ *** MICROBURST STRAIGHT LINE WIND DAMAGE CONSISTENT WITH 90 TO 100 MPH WIND SPEEDS. ONE RESIDENT WAS INJURED BY FLYING GLASS AS HE TRIED TO SHUT HIS FRONT DOOR. SOME VEHICLES WERE DAMAGED INCLUDING ONE THAT HAD BEEN ROLLED OVER. ROOF DAMAGE ALSO OCCURRED TO SEVERAL STRUCTURES AND A GARAGE WAS TOTALLY DESTROYED. SEVERAL LARGE TREES WERE ALSO UPROOTED.
A TREE WAS BLOWN DOWN IN THE HEARTBREAK RIDGE AREA. THIS IS A PUBLIC REPORT VIA SOCIAL MEDIA. THE TIME OF THE EVENT IS ESTIMATED FROM RADAR DATA.
MOBILE HOME FLIPPED.REPORT VIA BROADCAST MEDIA SOCIAL MEDIA POST.

FROM THE 500 BLOCK OF IRVINE TO 7TH STREET IN RAVENNA, NUMEROUS HOMES WITH SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE. SOME WITH ROOFS OFF. SEVERAL OUTBUILDINGS BLOWN OFF FOUNDATIONS. POWER IS OUT ACROSS MUCH OF ESTILL COUNTY.
A TWO STORY HOME LOST TOP STORY ON NORTH OAK STREET.
LARGE TREE LIMBS AND BRANCHES DOWN GREATER THAN 2 INCHES IN DIAMETER.PENNY SIZE HAIL.

*** 1 INJ *** HIGH WINDS IMPACTED SEVERAL STRUCTURES BETWEEN IRVINE AND RAVENNA. DAMAGE WAS CONFINED TO MAINLY ROOF TOPS OF SEVERAL HOMES AND BUSINESSES IN THE AREA. DAMAGE WAS CONSISTENT WITH WIND SPEEDS OF 80 TO 90 MPH.
